channel.title: VPN on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in VPN on simeononsecurity

item.title: Tailscale vs Headscale: Complete 2026 Comparison Guide for Self-Hosted VPN
item.category: "VPN" , "Network Security" , "Self-Hosted" , "WireGuard" , "Zero Trust" , "Mesh Networking" , "Open Source" , "Cloud Infrastructure" , "Remote Access" , "Network Management"
item.description: Comprehensive 2026 comparison of Tailscale and Headscale including features, pricing, performance, security, and deployment scenarios to help you choose the best WireGuard-based mesh VPN solution.

item.title: Cisco CCNA (200-301): Security Fundamentals
item.category: "Cisco CCNA Course" , "Networking" , "Network Security" , "Access Control Lists" , "VPN" , "Layer 2 Security" , "Cisco Certification" , "Wireless Security" , "AAA" , "IT Networking"
item.description: Master security fundamentals for the Cisco CCNA 200-301 exam. Learn security concepts, device access control, VPNs, access control lists, Layer 2 security, AAA, and wireless security.
